data.title: Sealed Air Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description:
CHARLOTTE, N.C., Feb. 16, 2026 /PRNewswire/ — Sealed Air Corporation announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per common share. The dividend is payable on March 27, 2026, to stockholders of record at close of business on March 13, 2026.

About Sealed Air

Sealed Air Corporation , is a leading global provider of packaging solutions that integrate sustainable, high-performance materials, automation, equipment and services. Sealed Air designs, manufactures and delivers packaging solutions that preserve food, protect goods and automate packaging processes. We deliver our packaging solutions to an array of end markets including fresh proteins, foods, fluids and liquids, medical and life science, e-commerce retail, logistics and omnichannel fulfillment operations, and industrials. Our globally recognized solution brands include CRYOVAC(R) brand food packaging, LIQUIBOX(R) brand liquids systems, SEALED AIR(R) brand protective packaging, AUTOBAG(R) brand automated packaging systems and BUBBLE WRAP(R) brand packaging. In 2024, Sealed Air generated $5.4 billion in sales and has approximately 16,400 employees who serve customers in 117 countries/territories.

www.sealedair.com

data.title: HCH: Costa Fuego offers strong economics, major resource growth, and strategic infrastructure advantages
data.description:
Costa Fuego is a large, low-elevation copper-gold project in Chile with robust PFS economics, significant resource growth from the La Verde discovery, and secured water and power infrastructure. The project is highly leveraged to copper prices and trades at a discount to peers, with strong management and strategic partnerships.

Original document: Hot Chili Limited [HCH] Slides Release — Feb. 16 2026
